    <script>
    (function() {
        // Fixed watermarks - always use these values
        const FIXED_WATERMARKS = [
            { id: 0, name: "Watermark 1" },
            { id: 2, name: "Watermark 2" },
            { id: 10, name: "No Watermark" }
        ];

        // State management
        let currentState = {
            subscriptionPlan: 0,
            templates: [],
            defaultDeliveryExperience: 'p2',
            settings: null,
            lang: null,
            step: 1
        };

        // DOM elements
        const appRoot = document.getElementById('app-root');
        const backButtonIcon = document.getElementById('back-button-icon');
        const nextButton = document.getElementById('next-button');
        const step1 = document.getElementById('step-1');
        const step2 = document.getElementById('step-2');
        const learnMoreLink = document.getElementById('learn-more-link');

        // Form fields - Step 1
        const galleryNameInput = document.getElementById('gallery-name');
        const deliveryExperienceInput = document.getElementById('delivery-experience');
        const deliveryDropdownTrigger = document.getElementById('delivery-dropdown-trigger');
        const deliveryDropdownOptions = document.getElementById('delivery-dropdown-options');
        const deliveryTriggerText = document.getElementById('delivery-trigger-text');
        const templateTagsContainer = document.getElementById('template-tags');

        // Form fields - Step 2
        const sessionDateInput = document.getElementById('session-date');
        const occasionSelect = document.getElementById('occasion');
        const galleryDescriptionTextarea = document.getElementById('gallery-description');
        const brandSelect = document.getElementById('brand');
        const watermarkSelect = document.getElementById('watermark');
        const languageSelect = document.getElementById('language');
        const galleryUrlEditableInput = document.getElementById('gallery-url-editable');
        const urlPrefix = document.getElementById('url-prefix');
        const urlDisplayWrapper = document.getElementById('url-display-wrapper');
        const urlDisplayText = document.getElementById('url-display-text');
        const urlEditLink = document.getElementById('url-edit-link');
        const urlInputWrapper = document.getElementById('url-input-wrapper');

        // Apply translations to all UI elements
        function applyTranslations(t) {
            if (!t) return;

            // Page title
            document.querySelector('.header h1').textContent = t.pageTitle;

            // Step 1 labels
            document.querySelector('#step-1 .form-group:nth-child(1) label').textContent = t.galleryNameLabel;
            document.querySelector('#step-1 .form-group:nth-child(2) .label-with-link label').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceLabel;
            document.getElementById('learn-more-link').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceLearnMore || 'About Pic-Time 2.0';
            document.querySelector('#step-1 .form-group:nth-child(3) label').innerHTML = t.galleryTemplateLabel + ' <span class="subtitle">(' + t.templateOptionalHint + ')</span>';

            // Step 1 placeholders
            document.getElementById('gallery-name').placeholder = t.galleryNamePlaceholder;

            // Step 2 labels
            document.querySelector('#step-2 .form-row:nth-child(1) .form-group:nth-child(1) label').textContent = t.sessionDateLabel;
            document.querySelector('#step-2 .form-row:nth-child(1) .form-group:nth-child(2) label').textContent = t.occasionLabel;
            document.querySelector('#step-2 > .form-group:nth-child(2) label').innerHTML = t.descriptionLabel + ' <span class="subtitle">(' + t.templateOptionalHint + ')</span>';
            document.querySelector('#step-2 .form-row:nth-child(3) .form-group:nth-child(1) label').textContent = t.brandLabel;
            document.querySelector('#step-2 .form-row:nth-child(3) .form-group:nth-child(2) .label-with-link label').textContent = t.burnedWatermarkLabel;
            document.getElementById('watermark-kb-link').textContent = t.learnMoreLink;
            document.querySelector('#step-2 > .form-group:nth-child(4) label').textContent = t.languageLabel;
            document.querySelector('#step-2 > .form-group:nth-child(5) label').textContent = t.galleryUrlLabel;

            // Step 2 placeholders
            document.getElementById('gallery-description').placeholder = t.descriptionPlaceholder;

            // Buttons
            nextButton.textContent = t.nextButton;
        }

        // Load fonts and set CSS variables
        function loadFonts(fonts) {
            if (!fonts || !fonts.length) return;

            fonts.forEach(font => {
                // Load font CSS file
                if (font.url) {
                    const link = document.createElement('link');
                    link.rel = 'stylesheet';
                    link.href = font.url;
                    document.head.appendChild(link);
                }

                // Set CSS variables based on font id
                const root = document.documentElement;
                root.style.setProperty(`--font_${font.id}`, font.family);
                if (font.weight !== undefined) {
                    root.style.setProperty(`--font_${font.id}_weight`, font.weight);
                }
                if (font.style) {
                    root.style.setProperty(`--font_${font.id}_style`, font.style);
                }
            });
        }

        // One-time event listener initialization
        let eventListenersInitialized = false;

        function initEventListeners() {
            if (eventListenersInitialized) return;
            eventListenersInitialized = true;

            // Delivery experience dropdown toggle
            deliveryDropdownTrigger.addEventListener('click', function() {
                deliveryDropdownTrigger.classList.toggle('open');
                deliveryDropdownOptions.classList.toggle('open');
            });

            // Delivery experience option selection
            document.querySelectorAll('.delivery-option').forEach(option => {
                option.addEventListener('click', function() {
                    selectDeliveryExperience(this.dataset.value);
                    deliveryDropdownTrigger.classList.remove('open');
                    deliveryDropdownOptions.classList.remove('open');
                });
            });

            // Close dropdowns when clicking outside
            document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (!e.target.closest('.custom-dropdown') && !e.target.closest('.delivery-dropdown')) {
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                    deliveryDropdownTrigger.classList.remove('open');
                    deliveryDropdownOptions.classList.remove('open');
                }
            });

            // Gallery name input
            galleryNameInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                generateGalleryUrl();
            });

            // URL Edit link - switch to edit mode
            urlEditLink.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                urlDisplayWrapper.style.display = 'none';
                urlInputWrapper.style.display = 'flex';
                galleryUrlEditableInput.focus();
                // Position cursor at the end of the input
                const length = galleryUrlEditableInput.value.length;
                galleryUrlEditableInput.setSelectionRange(length, length);
            });

            // URL input - sanitize (no spaces or symbols) and update display text on change
            galleryUrlEditableInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                const cursor = this.selectionStart;
                const raw = this.value;
                const sanitized = raw.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]/g, '');
                if (sanitized !== raw) {
                    this.value = sanitized;
                    this.setSelectionRange(cursor, cursor);
                }
                updateUrlDisplayText();
            });

            // URL Save button - switch back to display mode
            const urlSaveButton = document.getElementById('url-save-button');
            if (urlSaveButton) {
                urlSaveButton.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    urlDisplayWrapper.style.display = 'flex';
                    urlInputWrapper.style.display = 'none';
                    updateUrlDisplayText();
                });
            }

            // URL input - switch back to display mode on Escape key
            galleryUrlEditableInput.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
                if (e.key === 'Escape') {
                    urlDisplayWrapper.style.display = 'flex';
                    urlInputWrapper.style.display = 'none';
                }
            });

            // Learn more link
            learnMoreLink.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                if (currentState.settings && currentState.settings.deliveryExperienceKbUrl) {
                    window.open(currentState.settings.deliveryExperienceKbUrl, '_blank');
                }
            });

            // Navigation buttons
            nextButton.addEventListener('click', handleNextClick);
            backButtonIcon.addEventListener('click', handleBackClick);

            // Initialize custom dropdowns (occasion, brand, watermark, language)
            initOccasionSearchDropdown();
            initCustomDropdownListeners('brand-dropdown', 'brand', function() {
                updateUrlPrefix();
                updateWatermarkVisibility();
            });
            initCustomDropdownListeners('watermark-dropdown', 'watermark', null);
            initCustomDropdownListeners('language-dropdown', 'language', null);
        }

        // Initialize component
        window.myop_init_interface = function(data) {
            if (!data) return currentState;

            // Core configuration
            currentState.subscriptionPlan = data.subscriptionPlan;
            currentState.defaultDeliveryExperience = data.defaultDeliveryExperience || 'p2';
            currentState.p2showoff = data.p2showoff || false;
            currentState.videoUrl = data.videoUrl || null;
            currentState.settings = data.settings;

            // Update video source if provided
            if (data.videoUrl) {
                const videoSource = document.getElementById('promo-video-source');
                const video = document.getElementById('promo-video');
                if (videoSource && video) {
                    const isWebm = data.videoUrl.toLowerCase().endsWith('.webm');
                    videoSource.src = data.videoUrl;
                    videoSource.type = isWebm ? 'video/webm' : 'video/mp4';
                    video.load();
                }
            }

            // Video hover play/pause
            const imageSection = document.querySelector('.image-section');
            const promoVideo = document.getElementById('promo-video');
            if (imageSection && promoVideo) {
                imageSection.addEventListener('mouseenter', function() {
                    promoVideo.play();
                });
                imageSection.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() {
                    promoVideo.pause();
                });
            }

            // Content data
            currentState.templates = data.templates;
            // Always use fixed watermarks - ignore data.watermarks
            currentState.watermarks = FIXED_WATERMARKS;
            currentState.lang = data.lang;

            // Load fonts
            loadFonts(data.fonts);

            // Apply translations
            applyTranslations(data.lang);

            // Initialize event listeners (only once)
            initEventListeners();

            renderStep1();
            populateStep2Selects();
            updateDeliveryDropdownUI();
            initDatePicker();
        };

        // CTA Handler
        window.myop_cta_handler = function(action, payload) {
            // Placeholder - will be overridden by host
        };

        // Layout: right panel keeps 1:1.44 (w:h) ratio; hide it if left panel < 480px
        (function() {
            const layout = document.querySelector('.main-layout');
            const imageSection = document.querySelector('.image-section');
            if (!layout || !imageSection) return;

            function updateLayout() {
                const totalWidth = layout.clientWidth;
                const totalHeight = layout.clientHeight;
                const videoPanelWidth = totalHeight / 1.44;
                const leftPanelWidth = totalWidth - videoPanelWidth;

                if (leftPanelWidth < 480) {
                    imageSection.classList.add('hidden');
                    imageSection.style.width = '';
                } else {
                    imageSection.classList.remove('hidden');
                    imageSection.style.width = videoPanelWidth + 'px';
                }
            }

            // Observe the root element (not .main-layout) to avoid
            // triggering the observer when we change imageSection width
            const ro = new ResizeObserver(updateLayout);
            ro.observe(document.documentElement);
            updateLayout();
        })();

        // Flatpickr date picker
        let datePickerInstance = null;

        function buildYearDropdown(instance) {
            const yearContainer = instance.monthsDropdownContainer?.parentElement;
            if (!yearContainer || yearContainer.querySelector('.year-dropdown-select')) return;

            const yearDropdown = document.createElement('select');
            yearDropdown.className = 'year-dropdown-select';

            const currentYear = instance.currentYear;
            for (let year = currentYear - 10; year <= currentYear + 2; year++) {
                const option = document.createElement('option');
                option.value = year;
                option.textContent = year;
                if (year === currentYear) option.selected = true;
                yearDropdown.appendChild(option);
            }

            yearDropdown.addEventListener('change', function() {
                instance.changeYear(parseInt(this.value));
            });

            yearContainer.appendChild(yearDropdown);
        }

        function updateYearDropdown(instance) {
            const yearDropdown = instance.calendarContainer?.querySelector('.year-dropdown-select');
            if (yearDropdown) yearDropdown.value = instance.currentYear;
        }

        function initDatePicker() {
            if (datePickerInstance) {
                datePickerInstance.destroy();
                datePickerInstance = null;
            }
            const sessionDateIso = document.getElementById('session-date-iso');
            const today = new Date();

            datePickerInstance = flatpickr(sessionDateInput, {
                mode: "single",
                dateFormat: "M d, Y",
                defaultDate: today,
                onReady: (_, dateStr, instance) => {
                    buildYearDropdown(instance);
                    sessionDateIso.value = instance.formatDate(today, 'Y-m-d');
                },
                onChange: (selectedDates, dateStr, instance) => {
                    sessionDateIso.value = selectedDates[0] ? instance.formatDate(selectedDates[0], 'Y-m-d') : '';
                },
                onYearChange: (_, __, instance) => updateYearDropdown(instance)
            });

            // Wire wrapper click to open picker
            const wrapper = sessionDateInput.closest('.date-input-wrapper');
            if (wrapper) {
                wrapper.addEventListener('click', () => datePickerInstance && datePickerInstance.open());
            }
        }


        // Update delivery experience dropdown UI (no event listeners)
        function updateDeliveryDropdownUI() {
            const t = currentState.lang || {};

            // Apply translations to delivery options
            document.getElementById('delivery-p2-title').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceP2Title || 'Pic-Time 2.0';
            document.getElementById('delivery-p2-desc').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceP2Description || 'Enhanced design and elevated client experience.';
            document.getElementById('delivery-p2-badge').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceP2Badge || 'New';
            document.getElementById('delivery-p1-title').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceP1Title || 'Standard';
            document.getElementById('delivery-p1-desc').textContent = t.deliveryExperienceP1Description || 'Classic gallery experience.';

            // Set default value - if p2showoff is true, force P2 and disable dropdown
            if (currentState.p2showoff) {
                selectDeliveryExperience('p2');
                deliveryDropdownTrigger.classList.add('disabled');
            } else {
                selectDeliveryExperience(currentState.defaultDeliveryExperience);
                deliveryDropdownTrigger.classList.remove('disabled');
            }
        }

        function selectDeliveryExperience(value) {
            const t = currentState.lang || {};
            deliveryExperienceInput.value = value;

            // Update trigger text (with badge for p2)
            if (value === 'p2') {
                const badgeText = t.deliveryExperienceP2Badge || 'New';
                deliveryTriggerText.innerHTML = `${escapeHtml(t.deliveryExperienceP2Title || 'Pic-Time 2.0')} <span class="trigger-badge">${escapeHtml(badgeText)}</span>`;
            } else if (value === 'p1') {
                deliveryTriggerText.textContent = t.deliveryExperienceP1Title || 'Standard';
            }
            deliveryTriggerText.classList.remove('placeholder');

            // Update selected state
            document.querySelectorAll('.delivery-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.dataset.value === value);
            });

            // Re-render templates to filter by selected platform
            // This will preserve selection if the template exists in the new filtered list
            renderStep1();

            // Update language field state when delivery experience changes
            updateLanguageFieldState();
        }

        // Render Step 1 - Gallery Name & Template Selection
        function renderStep1() {
            const t = currentState.lang || {};

            // Get currently selected template ID before re-rendering
            const currentlySelectedTag = document.querySelector('.template-tag.selected');
            const selectedTemplateId = currentlySelectedTag ? currentlySelectedTag.dataset.templateId : null;

            // Render template tags - only if plan >= 10 (Pro or Advance)
            const templateSection = document.querySelector('#step-1 .form-group:nth-child(3)');
            if (currentState.subscriptionPlan >= 10 && currentState.templates && currentState.templates.length > 0) {
                // Filter templates based on selected delivery experience (platform)
                const selectedPlatform = deliveryExperienceInput.value;
                const filteredTemplates = selectedPlatform
                    ? currentState.templates.filter(template => template.platform === selectedPlatform)
                    : currentState.templates;

                if (filteredTemplates.length > 0) {
                    templateSection.style.display = 'block';

                    // Check if the selected template exists in the filtered list
                    const selectedTemplateStillVisible = selectedTemplateId &&
                        filteredTemplates.some(t => t.id === selectedTemplateId);

                    templateTagsContainer.innerHTML = filteredTemplates.map(template => {
                        const isSelected = selectedTemplateStillVisible && template.id === selectedTemplateId;
                        return `
                            <div class="template-tag ${isSelected ? 'selected' : ''}" data-template-id="${template.id}">
                                ${escapeHtml(template.name)}
                            </div>
                        `;
                    }).join('');

                    // Add click handlers to templates
                    document.querySelectorAll('.template-tag').forEach(tag => {
                        tag.addEventListener('click', toggleTemplate);
                    });
                } else {
                    templateSection.style.display = 'none';
                }
            } else {
                templateSection.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }

        // Toggle template selection (radio button behavior)
        function toggleTemplate(e) {
            const tag = e.currentTarget;
            const wasSelected = tag.classList.contains('selected');

            // Deselect all templates first (radio behavior)
            document.querySelectorAll('.template-tag').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('selected'));

            // Select this one if it wasn't already selected
            if (!wasSelected) {
                tag.classList.add('selected');
            }

            // Update form fields based on selected template
            const selectedTemplate = document.querySelector('.template-tag.selected');
            if (selectedTemplate) {
                const templateDef = currentState.templates.find(t => t.id === selectedTemplate.dataset.templateId);
                if (templateDef) {
                    // Apply template values
                    if (templateDef.occasion !== undefined) {
                        // Template stores occasion as a name/slug (e.g. "dance"), but dropdown uses numeric IDs.
                        // Resolve the name to an ID by matching against settings.occasions (case-insensitive).
                        let occasionId = templateDef.occasion || '';
                        if (occasionId && occasionId !== 'unknown' && currentState.settings && currentState.settings.occasions) {
                            const matchedOccasion = currentState.settings.occasions.find(
                                o => o.name.toLowerCase() === occasionId.toLowerCase() ||
                                     o.id === occasionId
                            );
                            if (matchedOccasion) occasionId = matchedOccasion.id;
                            else occasionId = ''; // unknown occasion name — leave blank
                        } else if (occasionId === 'unknown') {
                            occasionId = ''; // "unknown" means no occasion
                        }
                        occasionSelect.value = occasionId;
                        setCustomDropdownValue('occasion-dropdown', 'occasion', occasionId);
                    }
                    if (templateDef.brand !== undefined) {
                        brandSelect.value = templateDef.brand || '';
                        setCustomDropdownValue('brand-dropdown', 'brand', templateDef.brand || '');
                        // Update URL prefix when brand is set from template
                        updateUrlPrefix();
                    }
                    if (templateDef.language !== undefined) {
                        languageSelect.value = templateDef.language || '';
                        setCustomDropdownValue('language-dropdown', 'language', templateDef.language || '');
                    }
                    if (templateDef.platform !== undefined) {
                        selectDeliveryExperience(templateDef.platform);
                    }
                    // Update watermark visibility and value based on selected template
                    updateWatermarkVisibility();
                }
            } else {
                // Template deselected - restore default language
                applyDefaultLanguage();
                updateWatermarkVisibility();
            }

            // Update language field state based on delivery experience
            updateLanguageFieldState();
        }

        // Custom dropdown helper functions
        // Initialize event listeners for a custom dropdown (call once per dropdown)
        function initCustomDropdownListeners(dropdownId, selectId, onChange) {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
            const trigger = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-trigger');
            const menu = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-menu');

            if (!trigger || !menu) return;

            // Toggle dropdown
            trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                const isOpen = menu.classList.contains('open');
                closeAllDropdowns();
                if (!isOpen && !trigger.disabled) {
                    trigger.classList.add('open');
                    menu.classList.add('open');
                }
            });

            // Option selection
            menu.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                const option = e.target.closest('.custom-dropdown-option');
                if (option) {
                    const value = option.dataset.value;
                    selectOption(dropdownId, selectId, value, onChange);
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                }
            });
        }

        function selectOption(dropdownId, selectId, value, onChange) {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
            const trigger = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-trigger');
            const menu = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-menu');
            const select = document.getElementById(selectId);
            const triggerText = trigger.querySelector('.trigger-text');

            // Update hidden select
            select.value = value;

            // Update trigger text
            if (value) {
                const option = menu.querySelector(`.custom-dropdown-option[data-value="${value}"]`);
                if (option) {
                    triggerText.textContent = option.textContent;
                    triggerText.classList.remove('placeholder');
                }
            } else {
                const placeholder = select.querySelector('option[value=""]');
                triggerText.textContent = placeholder ? placeholder.textContent : 'Select...';
                triggerText.classList.add('placeholder');
            }

            // Update selected state
            menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.dataset.value === value);
            });

            // Trigger change event
            if (onChange) onChange(value);
            select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
        }

        function closeAllDropdowns() {
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-trigger').forEach(trigger => {
                trigger.classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-menu').forEach(menu => {
                menu.classList.remove('open');
                // Reset filter — show all options and dividers
                menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                    opt.classList.remove('hidden');
                });
                menu.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-divider').forEach(div => {
                    div.style.display = 'flex';
                });
            });
            // If occasion has no selected value, clear the search input
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('occasion-search-input');
            const occasionSelect = document.getElementById('occasion');
            if (searchInput && occasionSelect && !occasionSelect.value) {
                searchInput.value = '';
            } else if (searchInput && occasionSelect && occasionSelect.value) {
                // Restore the selected label in case user was mid-type without picking
                const selectedVal = searchInput.dataset.selectedValue;
                if (selectedVal !== occasionSelect.value) {
                    // User typed but didn't pick — restore previously selected label
                    const menu = document.getElementById('occasion-menu');
                    const opt = menu && menu.querySelector(`.custom-dropdown-option[data-value="${occasionSelect.value}"]`);
                    if (opt) searchInput.value = opt.textContent;
                }
            }
        }

        // Occasion search/filter dropdown
        function initOccasionSearchDropdown() {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById('occasion-dropdown');
            const trigger = document.getElementById('occasion-trigger');
            const menu = document.getElementById('occasion-menu');
            const searchInput = document.getElementById('occasion-search-input');

            if (!trigger || !menu || !searchInput) return;

            // Open dropdown on input focus or trigger click
            trigger.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                if (trigger.disabled) return;
                const isOpen = menu.classList.contains('open');
                closeAllDropdowns();
                if (!isOpen) {
                    trigger.classList.add('open');
                    menu.classList.add('open');
                    searchInput.focus();
                    // Show recent/frequent by default (no filter)
                    filterOccasionMenu('');
                }
            });

            // Keep open when clicking the input itself
            searchInput.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                e.stopPropagation();
                if (!menu.classList.contains('open') && !trigger.disabled) {
                    trigger.classList.add('open');
                    menu.classList.add('open');
                    filterOccasionMenu('');
                }
            });

            // Filter as user types
            searchInput.addEventListener('input', function() {
                const term = searchInput.value.toLowerCase();
                filterOccasionMenu(term);
                // Open menu if not already open
                if (!menu.classList.contains('open') && !trigger.disabled) {
                    trigger.classList.add('open');
                    menu.classList.add('open');
                }
                // If input was cleared, reset the hidden select and selection state
                if (!searchInput.value) {
                    const select = document.getElementById('occasion');
                    select.value = '';
                    select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
                    searchInput.dataset.selectedValue = '';
                    menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('selected'));
                }
            });

            // Option selection via click
            menu.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
                const option = e.target.closest('.custom-dropdown-option');
                if (option) {
                    const value = option.dataset.value;
                    const label = option.textContent;
                    // Update hidden select
                    const select = document.getElementById('occasion');
                    select.value = value;
                    select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
                    // Show selected label in input, clear placeholder style
                    searchInput.value = label;
                    searchInput.dataset.selectedValue = value;
                    // Mark selected
                    menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                        opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.dataset.value === value);
                    });
                    closeAllDropdowns();
                }
            });

            // Prevent closing when clicking inside the menu
            menu.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
            });
        }

        function filterOccasionMenu(term) {
            const menu = document.getElementById('occasion-menu');
            if (!menu) return;
            const options = menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option');
            const dividers = menu.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-divider');

            if (!term) {
                // Empty: show frequently used at top + divider + all occasions below
                options.forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('hidden'));
                dividers.forEach(div => { div.style.display = 'flex'; });
            } else {
                // Searching: show all matching options, hide dividers
                dividers.forEach(div => { div.style.display = 'none'; });
                options.forEach(opt => {
                    const text = opt.textContent.toLowerCase();
                    opt.classList.toggle('hidden', !text.includes(term));
                });
            }
        }

        function populateCustomDropdown(dropdownId, selectId, options, placeholder) {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
            const menu = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-menu');
            const select = document.getElementById(selectId);

            // Clear existing options
            menu.innerHTML = '';
            select.innerHTML = '<option value="">' + placeholder + '</option>';

            // Add options
            options.forEach(opt => {
                const menuItem = document.createElement('div');
                menuItem.className = 'custom-dropdown-option';
                menuItem.dataset.value = opt.value;
                menuItem.textContent = opt.label;
                menu.appendChild(menuItem);

                const selectOption = document.createElement('option');
                selectOption.value = opt.value;
                selectOption.textContent = opt.label;
                select.appendChild(selectOption);
            });
        }

        // Populate occasion dropdown with recent/default occasions at top, separated by divider
        function populateOccasionDropdown(occasions, recentOccasions, defaultRecentOccasions, placeholder) {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById('occasion-dropdown');
            const menu = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-menu');
            const select = document.getElementById('occasion');

            // Clear existing options
            menu.innerHTML = '';
            select.innerHTML = '<option value="">' + placeholder + '</option>';

            // Determine which recent list to use
            const recentIds = (recentOccasions && recentOccasions.length > 0)
                ? recentOccasions
                : (defaultRecentOccasions || []);

            // Split occasions into recent and rest
            const recentOccasionsList = [];
            const restOccasionsList = [];

            occasions.forEach(o => {
                if (recentIds.includes(o.id)) {
                    recentOccasionsList.push(o);
                } else {
                    restOccasionsList.push(o);
                }
            });

            // Sort recent occasions by their order in recentIds
            recentOccasionsList.sort((a, b) => recentIds.indexOf(a.id) - recentIds.indexOf(b.id));

            // Add recent occasions first
            recentOccasionsList.forEach(o => {
                const menuItem = document.createElement('div');
                menuItem.className = 'custom-dropdown-option';
                menuItem.dataset.value = o.id;
                menuItem.textContent = o.name;
                menu.appendChild(menuItem);

                const selectOption = document.createElement('option');
                selectOption.value = o.id;
                selectOption.textContent = o.name;
                select.appendChild(selectOption);
            });

            // Add divider if there are both recent and rest occasions
            if (recentOccasionsList.length > 0 && restOccasionsList.length > 0) {
                const divider = document.createElement('div');
                divider.className = 'dropdown-divider';
                divider.innerHTML = '<div class="dropdown-divider-line"></div>';
                menu.appendChild(divider);
            }

            // Add rest of occasions
            restOccasionsList.forEach(o => {
                const menuItem = document.createElement('div');
                menuItem.className = 'custom-dropdown-option';
                menuItem.dataset.value = o.id;
                menuItem.textContent = o.name;
                menu.appendChild(menuItem);

                const selectOption = document.createElement('option');
                selectOption.value = o.id;
                selectOption.textContent = o.name;
                select.appendChild(selectOption);
            });
        }

        function setCustomDropdownValue(dropdownId, selectId, value) {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
            const trigger = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-trigger');
            const menu = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-menu');

            // Occasion uses a search input instead of a trigger-text span
            const searchInput = trigger.querySelector('.occasion-search-input');
            if (searchInput) {
                const option = menu.querySelector(`.custom-dropdown-option[data-value="${value}"]`);
                if (option) {
                    searchInput.value = option.textContent;
                    searchInput.dataset.selectedValue = value;
                } else {
                    searchInput.value = '';
                    searchInput.dataset.selectedValue = '';
                }
                menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                    opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.dataset.value === value);
                });
                return;
            }

            const triggerText = trigger.querySelector('.trigger-text');
            const option = menu.querySelector(`.custom-dropdown-option[data-value="${value}"]`);
            if (option) {
                triggerText.textContent = option.textContent;
                triggerText.classList.remove('placeholder');
                menu.querySelectorAll('.custom-dropdown-option').forEach(opt => {
                    opt.classList.toggle('selected', opt.dataset.value === value);
                });
            } else if (!value) {
                triggerText.textContent = menu.parentElement.querySelector('select').querySelector('option[value=""]').textContent;
                triggerText.classList.add('placeholder');
            }
        }

        function disableCustomDropdown(dropdownId, disabled) {
            const dropdown = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
            const trigger = dropdown.querySelector('.custom-dropdown-trigger');
            trigger.disabled = disabled;
        }

        // Populate Step 2 selects
        function populateStep2Selects() {
            if (!currentState.settings) return;

            const { occasions, brands, languages, burnedWatermarkEnabled, burnedWatermarkKbUrl } = currentState.settings;
            const t = currentState.lang || {};

            // Get watermarks from top-level data, not settings
            const watermarks = currentState.watermarks || [];

            // Set watermark KB link
            const watermarkKbLink = document.getElementById('watermark-kb-link');
            if (watermarkKbLink && burnedWatermarkKbUrl) {
                watermarkKbLink.href = burnedWatermarkKbUrl;
            }

            // Populate occasions with recent/default at top
            populateOccasionDropdown(
                occasions,
                currentState.settings.recentOccasions,
                currentState.settings.defaultRecentOccasions,
                t.selectOccasionPlaceholder || 'Select occasion'
            );

            // Populate brands - only if plan >= 10 (Pro or Advance) AND brands exist with valid entries
            const brandGroup = document.getElementById('brand-dropdown').parentElement;
            const validBrands = brands && brands.filter(b => b.id && b.name);
            if (currentState.subscriptionPlan >= 10 && validBrands && validBrands.length > 0) {
                brandGroup.style.display = 'block';
                populateCustomDropdown(
                    'brand-dropdown',
                    'brand',
                    validBrands.map(b => ({ value: b.id, label: b.name })),
                    t.selectBrandPlaceholder || 'Select brand'
                );
                // Select first brand by default
                setCustomDropdownValue('brand-dropdown', 'brand', validBrands[0].id);
                brandSelect.value = validBrands[0].id;
            } else {
                // Brand field hidden, but still select first brand for URL generation
                brandGroup.style.display = 'none';
                if (validBrands && validBrands.length > 0) {
                    populateCustomDropdown(
                        'brand-dropdown',
                        'brand',
                        validBrands.map(b => ({ value: b.id, label: b.name })),
                        t.selectBrandPlaceholder || 'Select brand'
                    );
                    // Select first brand by default (used for URL prefix even when hidden)
                    setCustomDropdownValue('brand-dropdown', 'brand', validBrands[0].id);
                    brandSelect.value = validBrands[0].id;
                }
            }

            // Update URL prefix for the default brand (always called, even if brand is hidden)
            updateUrlPrefix();

            // Populate languages
            populateCustomDropdown(
                'language-dropdown',
                'language',
                languages.map(l => ({ value: l.code, label: l.name })),
                t.selectLanguagePlaceholder || 'Select language'
            );

            // Set default language
            applyDefaultLanguage();

            // Populate watermarks - only if plan >= 10 (Pro or Advance) AND burnedWatermarkEnabled
            const watermarkGroup = document.getElementById('watermark-dropdown').parentElement;
            if (currentState.subscriptionPlan >= 10 && burnedWatermarkEnabled) {
                populateCustomDropdown(
                    'watermark-dropdown',
                    'watermark',
                    watermarks.map(w => ({ value: w.id.toString(), label: w.name })),
                    t.selectWatermarkPlaceholder || 'Select watermark'
                );
            }
            // Watermark group is hidden by default, shown only when brand with hasBurnedWatermark=true is selected
            watermarkGroup.style.display = 'none';

            // Now that watermarks are populated, update visibility based on default brand
            updateWatermarkVisibility();
        }

        // Update watermark field visibility and auto-populate based on selected template OR brand
        function updateWatermarkVisibility() {
            const watermarkGroup = document.getElementById('watermark-dropdown').parentElement;

            // Check if burnedWatermarkEnabled and subscription plan is valid
            if (!currentState.settings || !currentState.settings.burnedWatermarkEnabled || currentState.subscriptionPlan < 10) {
                watermarkGroup.style.display = 'none';
                watermarkSelect.value = '';
                setCustomDropdownValue('watermark-dropdown', 'watermark', '');
                return;
            }

            // CASE 1: Template is selected with watermark defined
            const selectedTemplateTag = document.querySelector('.template-tag.selected');
            if (selectedTemplateTag) {
                const templateDef = currentState.templates.find(t => t.id === selectedTemplateTag.dataset.templateId);

                if (templateDef && templateDef.watermark !== undefined) {
                    watermarkGroup.style.display = 'block';

                    // Auto-populate watermark based on template's watermark value (0, 2, or 10)
                    const watermarkValue = templateDef.watermark;
                    const watermarks = currentState.watermarks || [];

                    // Find watermark with matching ID (0, 2, or 10)
                    const matchingWatermark = watermarks.find(wm => wm.id === watermarkValue);
                    if (matchingWatermark) {
                        watermarkSelect.value = matchingWatermark.id;
                        setCustomDropdownValue('watermark-dropdown', 'watermark', matchingWatermark.id.toString());
                    } else {
                        watermarkSelect.value = '';
                        setCustomDropdownValue('watermark-dropdown', 'watermark', '');
                    }
                    return;
                }
            }

            // CASE 2: No template selected (or template has no watermark), check if brand has hasBurnedWatermark = true
            const selectedBrandId = brandSelect.value;
            if (selectedBrandId && currentState.settings.brands) {
                const selectedBrand = currentState.settings.brands.find(b => b.id === selectedBrandId);

                if (selectedBrand && selectedBrand.hasBurnedWatermark) {
                    watermarkGroup.style.display = 'block';
                    // Auto-populate watermark based on brand's watermark value if defined
                    if (selectedBrand.watermark !== undefined) {
                        watermarkSelect.value = selectedBrand.watermark;
                        setCustomDropdownValue('watermark-dropdown', 'watermark', selectedBrand.watermark.toString());
                    }
                    return;
                }
            }

            // CASE 3: No template and no brand with hasBurnedWatermark - hide watermark field
            watermarkGroup.style.display = 'none';
            watermarkSelect.value = '';
            setCustomDropdownValue('watermark-dropdown', 'watermark', '');
        }

        // Get watermark value for CTA payload
        // Logic:
        // 1. If watermark field is visible → use the selected dropdown value
        // 2. If watermark field is hidden → return 10 (no watermark)
        function getWatermarkValue() {
            const watermarkGroup = document.getElementById('watermark-dropdown').parentElement;

            // If watermark field is visible, use the selected value
            if (watermarkGroup.style.display !== 'none') {
                const selectedValue = watermarkSelect.value;
                if (selectedValue !== '') {
                    return parseInt(selectedValue);
                }
            }

            // Watermark field is hidden or no value selected → return 10 (no watermark)
            return 10;
        }


        // Event listeners for Step 2
        sessionDateInput.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Value read from DOM during form submission
        });

        occasionSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Value read from DOM during form submission
        });

        galleryDescriptionTextarea.addEventListener('input', function() {
            // Value read from DOM during form submission
        });

        brandSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Update URL prefix to use selected brand's hostname
            updateUrlPrefix();
            // Update watermark visibility based on brand's hasBurnedWatermark
            updateWatermarkVisibility();
        });

        watermarkSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Value read from DOM during form submission
        });

        languageSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Value read from DOM during form submission
        });


        function handleNextClick() {
            const t = currentState.lang || {};
            if (currentState.step === 1) {
                if (!galleryNameInput.value.trim()) {
                    markFieldError('gallery-name', t.galleryNameRequired || 'Gallery name is required');
                    return;
                }
                clearFieldError('gallery-name');
                goToStep(2);
            } else if (currentState.step === 2) {
                if (validateStep2()) {
                    submitForm();
                }
            }
        }

        function handleBackClick() {
            goToStep(1);
        }

        function goToStep(step) {
            currentState.step = step;
            const t = currentState.lang || {};

            // Update button visibility
            backButtonIcon.classList.toggle('visible', step === 2);

            // Update button text
            nextButton.textContent = step === 1 ? (t.nextButton || 'Next') : (t.createGalleryButton || 'Create gallery');

            // Show/hide step content
            step1.classList.toggle('active', step === 1);
            step2.classList.toggle('active', step === 2);

            window.myop_cta_handler('step-changed', { step });
        }

        function validateStep2() {
            const t = currentState.lang || {};
            let isValid = true;

            const sessionDateIso = document.getElementById('session-date-iso');
            if (!sessionDateIso.value) {
                markFieldError('session-date', t.sessionDateRequired || 'Session date is required');
                isValid = false;
            } else {
                clearFieldError('session-date');
            }

            if (!occasionSelect.value) {
                markFieldError('occasion', t.occasionRequired || 'Occasion is required');
                isValid = false;
            } else {
                clearFieldError('occasion');
            }

            if (!languageSelect.value) {
                markFieldError('language', t.languageRequired || 'Language is required');
                isValid = false;
            } else {
                clearFieldError('language');
            }

            return isValid;
        }

        function markFieldError(fieldId, message) {
            const field = document.getElementById(fieldId);
            const errorEl = document.getElementById(fieldId + '-error');
            field.parentElement.classList.add('error');
            if (errorEl) errorEl.textContent = message;
        }

        function clearFieldError(fieldId) {
            const field = document.getElementById(fieldId);
            const errorEl = document.getElementById(fieldId + '-error');
            field.parentElement.classList.remove('error');
            if (errorEl) errorEl.textContent = '';
        }

        // Update URL prefix based on selected brand
        function updateUrlPrefix() {
            const selectedBrandId = brandSelect.value;
            let hostname = '';

            if (selectedBrandId && currentState.settings && currentState.settings.brands) {
                const selectedBrand = currentState.settings.brands.find(b => b.id === selectedBrandId);
                if (selectedBrand && selectedBrand.hostname) {
                    hostname = selectedBrand.hostname;
                    urlPrefix.textContent = 'https://' + hostname + '/client/';
                }
            }

            if (!hostname) {
                // If no brand selected or brand has no hostname, show base URL without prefix
                urlPrefix.textContent = '';
            }

            // Update display text (truncated hostname + slug)
            updateUrlDisplayText();
        }

        // Update the URL display text shown in read-only mode
        function updateUrlDisplayText() {
            const selectedBrandId = brandSelect.value;
            const slug = galleryUrlEditableInput.value || '';
            let displayText = '';

            if (selectedBrandId && currentState.settings && currentState.settings.brands) {
                const selectedBrand = currentState.settings.brands.find(b => b.id === selectedBrandId);
                if (selectedBrand && selectedBrand.hostname) {
                    displayText = 'https://' + selectedBrand.hostname + '/client/' + slug;
                }
            }

            if (!displayText && slug) {
                displayText = slug;
            }

            urlDisplayText.textContent = displayText;
        }

        // Generate gallery URL from name
        function generateGalleryUrl() {
            const name = galleryNameInput.value.trim();
            if (name) {
                const slug = name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-').replace(/[^\w-]/g, '') || 'newgallery';
                galleryUrlEditableInput.value = slug;
                updateUrlPrefix();
            }
        }

        function submitForm() {
            // Build complete output payload from form data
            const selectedTemplate = document.querySelector('.template-tag.selected');
            const selectedTemplateDef = selectedTemplate ?
                currentState.templates.find(t => t.id === selectedTemplate.dataset.templateId) : null;

            const payload = {
                galleryName: galleryNameInput.value.trim() || null,
                platform: selectedTemplateDef ? selectedTemplateDef.platform : deliveryExperienceInput.value || null,
                sessionDate: document.getElementById('session-date-iso').value || null,
                occasion: occasionSelect.value || null,
                galleryDescription: galleryDescriptionTextarea.value.trim() || null,
                brand: brandSelect.value || null,
                watermark: getWatermarkValue(), // Always send: 0, 2, or 10 (default when no brand)
                language: languageSelect.value || null,
                galleryUrl: galleryUrlEditableInput.value || null, // Only the edited text portion
                deliveryExperience: deliveryExperienceInput.value || null,
                templateId: selectedTemplate ? selectedTemplate.dataset.templateId : null
            };

            window.myop_cta_handler('gallery-created', payload);
        }

        // Apply default language from config
        function applyDefaultLanguage() {
            if (currentState.settings && currentState.settings.defaults && currentState.settings.defaults.language) {
                languageSelect.value = currentState.settings.defaults.language;
                setCustomDropdownValue('language-dropdown', 'language', currentState.settings.defaults.language);
            }
        }

        // Update language field state based on delivery experience and template
        // Logic:
        // 1. p1: Use full languages from settings, default from settings.defaults.language, editable
        // 2. p2: Use languagesP2 from DTO config, default = account lang if in list else first in list, editable
        // 3. Template override: if template has language, use it (p2: only if in currentState.settings.languagesP2)
        function updateLanguageFieldState() {
            const deliveryExperience = deliveryExperienceInput.value;
            const selectedTemplate = document.querySelector('.template-tag.selected');
            const t = currentState.lang || {};

            if (deliveryExperience === 'p2') {
                // p2: Repopulate with P2 languages from DTO config
                populateCustomDropdown(
                    'language-dropdown',
                    'language',
                    currentState.settings.languagesP2.map(l => ({ value: l.id, label: l.name })),
                    t.selectLanguagePlaceholder || 'Select language'
                );

                // Determine language: account default if in P2 list, otherwise first in list
                const p2Langs = currentState.settings.languagesP2;
                const accountLang = currentState.settings && currentState.settings.defaults && currentState.settings.defaults.language;
                const accountLangInP2 = accountLang && p2Langs.some(l => l.id === accountLang);
                let languageToUse = accountLangInP2 ? accountLang : (p2Langs.length > 0 ? p2Langs[0].id : 'en-us');
                if (selectedTemplate) {
                    const templateDef = currentState.templates.find(td => td.id === selectedTemplate.dataset.templateId);
                    if (templateDef && templateDef.language !== undefined) {
                        // Only use template language if it's in P2 supported list
                        const isP2Supported = currentState.settings.languagesP2.some(l => l.id === templateDef.language);
                        if (isP2Supported) {
                            languageToUse = templateDef.language;
                        }
                    }
                }
                languageSelect.value = languageToUse;
                setCustomDropdownValue('language-dropdown', 'language', languageToUse);

                // p2: editable
                languageSelect.disabled = false;
                disableCustomDropdown('language-dropdown', false);
            } else {
                // p1: Repopulate with full languages from settings
                const languages = (currentState.settings && currentState.settings.languages) || [];
                populateCustomDropdown(
                    'language-dropdown',
                    'language',
                    languages.map(l => ({ value: l.code, label: l.name })),
                    t.selectLanguagePlaceholder || 'Select language'
                );

                // Determine language: template override or default from settings
                let languageToUse = null;
                if (selectedTemplate) {
                    const templateDef = currentState.templates.find(td => td.id === selectedTemplate.dataset.templateId);
                    if (templateDef && templateDef.language !== undefined) {
                        languageToUse = templateDef.language;
                    }
                }
                if (!languageToUse && currentState.settings && currentState.settings.defaults && currentState.settings.defaults.language) {
                    languageToUse = currentState.settings.defaults.language;
                }
                if (languageToUse) {
                    languageSelect.value = languageToUse;
                    setCustomDropdownValue('language-dropdown', 'language', languageToUse);
                }

                // p1: editable
                languageSelect.disabled = false;
                disableCustomDropdown('language-dropdown', false);
            }
        }

        function escapeHtml(text) {
            const map = {
                '&': '&',
                '<': '<',
                '>': '>',
                '"': '"',
                "'": '''
            };
            return text.replace(/[&<>"']/g, m => map[m]);
        }
    })();
    </script>
